paths.title: Foundations of Machine Learning
paths.description: Build a solid mathematical and conceptual grounding. Covers linear models, error decomposition, and essential optimization.

paths.title: Deep Learning Architectures
paths.description: Trace the evolution up to modern landmarks. Covers CNNs, initialization, and Memory Networks.

paths.title: The Path to Modern LLMs
paths.description: Map the trajectory from word embeddings to modern generative pre-trained transformers.

paths.title: Reinforcement Learning from Zero to RLHF
paths.description: Construct a journey from basic decision processes to aligning complex models.

paths.title: Computer Vision Essentials
paths.description: Teach how ML systems "see" and map vision features to text.

paths.title: Scaling & Interpretability
paths.description: Explore the bleeding edge of deployment, pruning, and safety mechanisms for advanced users.

paths.title: Generalization & Learning Theory
paths.description: Rare but high-value theoretical foundations. Move from PAC learning and VC dimension to modern insights like double descent and neural collapse.

paths.title: Optimization Dynamics
paths.description: Deep dive into why models converge. From convex fundamentals to the implicit bias of SGD and sharpness-aware minimization.

paths.title: Information-Theoretic ML
paths.description: The physics of information in learning. Entropy, mutual information, and the MDL principle as a lens for generalization.

paths.title: Representation Learning
paths.description: How models learn useful features. Explore contrastive learning, self-supervised systems like SimCLR/BYOL, and disentanglement.

paths.title: Embedding & Similarity
paths.description: The engine of modern search and retrieval. Metric learning, vector databases, and efficient ANN search systems.

paths.title: Multimodal Learning
paths.description: Bridging vision and language. Study CLIP, cross-modal embeddings, and unified multimodal transformers.

paths.title: LLM Systems
paths.description: The engineering behind large models. Scaling laws, tokenization, KV cache optimization, and high-performance serving.

paths.title: LLM Reasoning
paths.description: Inducing System 2 thinking. From in-context learning to chain-of-thought and learned tool-use architectures.

paths.title: Alignment & Safety
paths.description: Ensuring models behave predictably. RLHF, DPO, reward modeling, and the frontiers of mechanistic interpretability.

paths.title: Diffusion Models
paths.description: Modern generative engines. Score matching, SDEs, and the transition to latent diffusion and video generation.

paths.title: Generative Modeling Theory
paths.description: The mathematical framework of creation. VAEs, normalizing flows, and energy-based models.

paths.title: Transformer Variants
paths.description: Beyond vanilla attention. Explore Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), linear attention, and state-space models like Mamba.

paths.title: Neural Fields & Continuous Representations
paths.description: Implicit neural representations for vision and physics. Study NeRF and the emerging world of Gaussian splatting.

paths.title: Distributed Training
paths.description: Training at warehouse scale. Data parallelism, model parallelism, and FSDP/ZeRO techniques.

paths.title: Efficient ML
paths.description: Inference and training efficiency. Quantization, low-rank adaptation (LoRA), and structured pruning.

paths.title: Data-Centric AI
paths.description: Focusing on the data, not just the model. Dataset design, curation, and quality governance.

paths.title: Robustness & OOD
paths.description: Reliability under pressure. Handling adversarial examples, distribution shift, and uncertainty estimation.

paths.title: Causal Machine Learning
paths.description: Moving from correlation to causation. Structural causal models, counterfactuals, and IRM.

paths.title: Decision Making & RL
paths.description: The logic of reward-driven behavior. Policy gradients, actor-critic methods, and offline reinforcement learning.

paths.title: ML for Science
paths.description: Physics-informed learning and surrogate models for scientific discovery.

paths.title: Statistical Decision Theory & Inference
paths.description: Bridge the probability and decision-theoretic ideas that connect Bayesian inference, calibrated prediction, and classical statistical learning.

paths.title: Learning Theory & Evaluation
paths.description: Connect risk minimization, validation protocol, evaluation metrics, and deployment-shift thinking so model selection and measurement line up with generalization.

paths.title: Classical Supervised ML
paths.description: Fill in the classical classification concepts around margins, kernels, asymmetric costs, and imbalance-aware objectives.

paths.title: RL, Causality & History Anchors
paths.description: Anchor reinforcement learning, causal inference, and two landmark papers that shaped modern deep learning and transformers.

paths.title: Statistical Inference & Calibration
paths.description: Move from hypothesis testing and likelihood methods to uncertainty quantification and probabilistic scoring.

paths.title: Classical & Probabilistic Models
paths.description: Study classical unsupervised, latent-variable, and sequential-state models that still shape modern machine learning.

paths.title: Experimental Method & RL Fundamentals
paths.description: Connect reliable experimentation to the dynamic-programming and return-estimation ideas at the core of reinforcement learning.

paths.title: Causal Inference & Historical Bridges
paths.description: Bridge causal estimands, interventional reasoning, and the landmark sequence-model ideas that led into modern attention and deep learning.
